quality_highlights: continuous-refactoring.md - excellent narrative structure with concrete metrics (79% merge rate, 112 PRs)
stale-pr-cleanup.md - empathetic automation with 'This is not a rejection!' messaging

single_file_improvements.issue: Error message 'Package may or may not exist on PyPI' creates uncertainty. Should provide clear expectation (runtime install) and actionable next step (PyPI URL).
Security workflows described generically without concrete detection examples. Enterprise security teams need to see specific patterns (AWS keys, GitHub tokens, etc.) to evaluate effectiveness.
Expected behavior 'All operations should succeed' lacks explicit success criteria. Should list specific expected outcomes (searches return results, access granted, etc.).
